name: Antigravity
description: Google's agent-first development platform with a VS Code fork IDE (Desktop App) and CLI (agy) — powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash with multi-agent orchestration. Successor to Gemini CLI.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 20 agent requests/day (~5 hour refresh). 5 requests/minute. Tab completions unlimited.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier cut ~92% from original 250 req/day. No credit card required. All 5 models on free tier but heavily rate-limited.

notes: Also listed under CLI coding agents. Three surfaces: Desktop App (VS Code fork), CLI (agy), SDK. Gemini CLI/Code Assist free tier stops June 18, 2026 — migrate here. Paid: AI Pro $20/mo, AI Ultra $249.99/mo. Launched Nov 2025, v2.0 at Google I/O May 2026.

name: Cursor
description: AI-native standalone IDE (VS Code fork) by Anysphere with agentic coding, multi-model support, Composer 2.5, and deep codebase understanding.

free_tier_limits.chat_messages: included in 50 slow premium requests pool (shared with Agent and Composer)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Premium models at slow speed on free tier. Monthly pool of 50 resets. No credit card needed.
free_tier_limits.notes: Hobby plan (free) includes limited Agent + limited Tab completions. 7-day free Pro trial. Students get 1 year free Pro with .edu.

notes: Free Hobby: 2,000 Tab/mo + 50 slow premium requests/mo. Pro $20/mo ($16 annual): unlimited Tab, $20 API credit pool, unlimited Agent runs, all frontier models at full speed, MCP, cloud agents. Pro+ $60/mo, Ultra $200/mo. Credit-based since late 2025. Own model: Composer 2.5. Trusted by Coinbase, OpenAI, Stripe, NVIDIA.

name: Windsurf
description: AI-native standalone IDE (VS Code fork) originally by Codeium, now owned by Cognition AI and rebranded as Devin Desktop. Features Cascade/Devin Local agent for multi-file editing.
referrals: yes - 250 flex credits for both parties on Pro referral.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Limited model selection on free. SWE-1.6 at slow speed. Unlimited Tab completions and inline edits.
free_tier_limits.notes: Legacy was 25 credits/month (pre-Mar 2026). Now quota-based with daily/weekly refresh. No credit card required for free.

notes: Timeline: Codeium (2021) → Windsurf IDE (late 2024) → Acquired by Cognition AI ($250M, Dec 2025) → Rebranding to Devin Desktop (June 2026). Cascade replaced by Devin Local (Rust, 30% more token efficient). Free: unlimited autocomplete + inline edits, limited agent. Pro $20/mo, Max $200/mo. Also listed under BYOK extensions.

name: Trae
description: AI-powered standalone IDE (VS Code fork) and coding assistant by ByteDance with code completion, agentic SOLO mode, and multi-model selection.
referrals: yes - SOLO Beta Invite Code Referral Program (April 2026)

free_tier_limits.chat_messages: limited by Basic Usage allocation (usage-based, depends on model)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Standard queue priority (slower than paid). 2 concurrent cloud tasks. Limited SOLO mode.
free_tier_limits.notes: No credit card required. Access to Claude Sonnet 4, GPT-4o, DeepSeek R1, Gemini 2.5 Pro, Doubao 1.5 Pro for free.

notes: Also listed under VS Code extensions. Available as standalone IDE (macOS/Windows/Web/iOS/Android) AND VS Code/JetBrains plugin. Formerly MarsCode. Paid: Lite $3/mo, Pro $10/mo, Pro+ $30/mo, Ultra $100/mo. Privacy concerns: ByteDance telemetry, 5-year data retention. No offline mode.

name: Orchids
description: AI-powered full-stack app builder/IDE that generates web, mobile, Slack bots, Chrome extensions, and AI agents from natural language. Brings your own AI subscription or API key. YC W25 startup.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 1 deployed project max on free. No code download/export on free. Community support only.
free_tier_limits.notes: Brings own AI provider (uses your ChatGPT/Claude/Copilot sub or BYOK). Tokens represent ~1 word of AI output. Free tier locked — cannot export code. Free tier only has Orchids Agent (task orchestrator), not foundation models. Paid: Pro $25/mo, Premium $50/mo, Ultra $99/mo, Max $200/mo.

notes: Y Combinator W25 startup by Kevin Lu and Bach Tran. 'World's first AI full-stack engineer.' Ranks #1 on App Bench (76%) and UI Bench. Desktop app (Mac/Win/Linux) + web. Built-in VS Code editor, terminal, Git sync, one-click deploy. Zero proprietary foundation models — the Orchids Agent is a task orchestrator that delegates to whatever model you provide (via subscription linking: ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini/Copilot, or raw API key). Free tier only has the Orchids Agent with 100k tokens/day. Paid ($25-200/mo) adds built-in Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, GPT-5. 1M+ users claimed. Users report data loss issues.

name: Replit
description: Browser-based IDE with AI Agent 4 that builds, debugs, and deploys full-stack apps from natural language. Includes hosting, database, auth, and collaboration.

free_tier_limits.free_requests_per_day: dynamic effort-based credits (daily reset up to monthly cap)
free_tier_limits.free_requests_per_month: monthly cloud credit cap (not publicly specified)
free_tier_limits.chat_messages: daily capped Agent chat (Lite mode only)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 1 published app (30-day expiry). Lite build only. No third-party connectors. 'Made with Replit' badge required. Web + mobile only.
free_tier_limits.notes: Replit uses opaque effort-based pricing — exact daily credit count deliberately not published. One-time free Agent checkpoints at signup.

notes: Free (Starter): daily Agent credits (Lite), monthly cloud credits, 1 app (30-day expiry), watermark. Core $20/mo: $25 credits, 5 collaborators, Full build, connectors, AI Integrations. Pro $95/mo: $100 credits, 15 collaborators, Turbo mode, 10 parallel agents. AI: Agent uses Claude Sonnet 4.5, Assistant uses Gemini, completion uses replit-code-v1.5-3b.

name: Zed
description: High-performance code editor written in Rust with GPU-accelerated rendering, built-in AI agentic editing, and real-time multiplayer collaboration. By original Atom/Tree-sitter team.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: BYOK uses your own API rate limits. No Zed-imposed limits on free tier AI usage.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier includes full editor, collaboration, and limited edit predictions. No Zed-hosted AI models on free. Bring your own API keys.

notes: Open-source (GPL editor, Apache 2.0 GPUI). Created by Nathan Sobo, Antonio Scandurra, Max Brunsfeld (ex-Atom/GitHub). Pro $10/mo ($5 AI credits). Business $30/seat/mo. Student free 1 year. Key: Zeta2.1 open-weight edit prediction, real-time multiplayer, MCP/ACP, DAP debugger, extensions ecosystem (200+), remote dev. macOS, Linux, Windows.

name: Kiro
description: AWS/Amazon's agentic AI IDE and CLI for spec-driven development, code generation, and autonomous agentic coding. Evolved from Amazon Q Developer CLI.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 50 credits/month. Simple prompts <1 credit, complex tasks use more. Overage $0.04/credit.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier includes Claude Sonnet 4.5 and open weight models (Qwen3 Coder Next, DeepSeek v3.2, MiniMax M2.1). No AWS account needed.

notes: Also listed under CLI coding agents. AWS product from Amazon Q Developer CLI. Open source (GitHub: kirodotdev/Kiro, 3.9k stars). Available as IDE, CLI, and web. Paid: Pro $20/mo (1000 credits), Pro+ $40/mo (2000), Power $200/mo (10000).

name: Codex
description: OpenAI's open-source, Rust-built terminal-based coding agent that reads, edits, and runs code locally with OS-level sandboxing.

free_tier_limits.free_requests_per_month: limited (ChatGPT Free plan — very limited Codex access)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: ChatGPT Free: very limited. Plus: 15-80 GPT-5.5 msgs/5h. API key: usage-based. Standard $5 new account free credits apply.
free_tier_limits.notes: ChatGPT Free plan includes limited Codex access. No free API credits specifically for Codex. Codex is a CLI tool, not a GUI IDE.

notes: Also listed under CLI coding agents. Open source (Apache-2.0), 90k+ GitHub stars. Requires ChatGPT account or OpenAI API key. Built in Rust. Sandboxed execution. macOS, Linux, Windows. Note: this is a CLI tool, not a GUI IDE.

name: Stagewise
description: Open source agentic IDE for creating and orchestrating coding agents with built-in browser, app previews, and git workflows. YC S25 startup.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Limited access to all 28+ models. 87.6% avg cache hit rate reduces effective cost. BYOK for unlimited use.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier gives limited access to ALL models. BYOK can be added at any tier for unlimited usage with own API keys.

notes: YC S25 startup by Glenn Tows and Julian Goetze (stagewise GmbH). AGPLv3, GitHub: 6.7k stars. Originally frontend-focused (npx stagewise), pivoted to full desktop agentic IDE May 2026. Parallel multi-agent orchestration, built-in browser engine, DOM element selection. Paid: Pro $20/mo (6x limits), Ultra $200/mo (75x). Linux DEB available (macOS/Windows coming soon).
